reason: Frontend directory conventions — reader component placement and lib/ module conventions

State management — zoom level and page position state across tabs

Quality bar — ESLint, Prettier, test coverage for new reader code

Cross-layer data flow — PDF URL construction goes through platform.ts / api.ts
PDF.js integration patterns — how XReadAgent uses pdfjs-dist, worker setup, rendering approach
Dual-column UX patterns — BabelDOC alternating-page model, scroll sync strategies
Complete inventory of existing reader code — PdfViewer, TranslateDialog, paper-read.tsx, API layer, types
Translation pipeline trace — API contracts, WS events, manifest structure
Task PRD — all requirements, decisions, acceptance criteria
